vocab.example: I'm often hesitant to buy footwear online because of the lack of standardized sizing across different brands.
A flexible return and exchange policy is a prerequisite for me when choosing an e-commerce platform for shoes.
When shopping for designer sneakers online, one must be wary of counterfeit goods masquerading as the real deal.

vocab.meaning: đánh giá/nhận xét của khách hàng
vocab.example: I meticulously scrutinize customer testimonials to gauge whether a pair of boots is actually comfortable for long walks.

vocab.meaning: cửa hàng truyền thống (cửa hàng vật lý)
vocab.example: I usually try the shoes on in a bricks-and-mortar store first before hunting for a better price online.
I only transact on websites that utilize a secure payment gateway to protect my financial information.

vocab.meaning: thử đồ bằng công nghệ thực tế ảo tăng cường
vocab.example: Some high-end apps now offer AR fitting, allowing you to see how the shoes look on your feet through your phone camera.
The primary advantage of online shopping is the ability to perform a quick price comparison across multiple retailers.
I always check the material composition to ensure the shoes are made of genuine leather rather than synthetic alternatives.
The sheer convenience of doorstep delivery makes online shoe shopping an attractive option for busy professionals.
